summary: Phase 5 adds the guarded CPU apply foundation, AC/DC CPU editor redesign, read-only power plan management previews, command-line process matching, PresentMon lifecycle cleanup, and improved LibreHardwareMonitor headline parsing.

active_power_plan.name: AERO24_MODERATE_AGGRESSIVE_GAMING
active_power_plan.export_failure: Unable to perform operation. An unexpected error (0x522) has occurred: A required privilege is not held by the client.

ui_changes: CPU Presets page has a global AC/DC selector.
CPU setting cards show current-vs-desired status for the selected side only.
Settings/Safety includes read-only power plan listing and preview-only create/set controls.
Sensors page shows selected LibreHardwareMonitor CPU headline source.
Dashboard shows Phase 5 backup/export/apply gate status.
